channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #172 - 2026-06-28
item.description:
🚨 Bambu Lab Launches PLA Pure, a New Filament Engineered for Safer Home Printing Shenzhen-based desktop 3D printer manufacturer Bambu Lab has introduced PLA Pure, a new filament developed for consumer 3D printing environments where safety, air quality and material traceability are priorities. The launch is positioned as a response to growing demand for cleaner, more transparent materials as desktop printers become increasingly common in homes, shared spaces and…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/image1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/bambu-lab-launches-pla-pure-a-new-filament-engineered-for-safer-home-printing-252515

💻 Continuum Powders publishes circular manufacturing playbook backed by Rice University powder benchmarking Independent testing by Rice University’s Particle Flow & Tribology Laboratory showed that reclaimed M247 nickel superalloy powder achieved superior additive manufacturing suitability scores compared to two widely... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 27, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Continuum-Powders-Playbook-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/continuum-powders-publishes-circular-manufacturing-playbook-backed-by-rice-university-powder-benchmarking

🖨 Phase3D Closes $2.9M Funding Round for Metal AM Inspection Chicago-based 3D printing quality assurance software developer Phase3D, has closed a $2.9 million funding round. Quest Venture Partners led the raise, with participation from Trinity Capital, Kinisis Ventures, Leroy Street Capital Partners, Asimov Ventures, and others, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Artboard_1-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/phase3d-closes-2-9m-funding-round-for-metal-am-inspection-252618

🖨 3YOURMIND, Phillips Corporation Join NPS Experiment at RIMPAC 2026 3D printing software developer 3YOURMIND and Phillips Corporation Federal Division are participating in a distributed manufacturing experiment organized by the Naval Postgraduate School (NPS) as part of the biennial... The experiment, conducted through the NPS Consortium for…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/3YOURMIND-Manufacturing-Ecosystem-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/3yourmind-phillips-corporation-join-nps-experiment-at-rimpac-2026-252631

🏠 AML3D Commissions First Two ARCEMY X Systems at NNS Australian 3D printer manufacturer AML3D has commissioned two large-scale ARCEMY X metal additive manufacturing (AM) systems at Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS), finalizing an initial approximately AU$4.5 million (approx. US$3.2 million) order, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/2026-06-19-AL3-FIRST-ARCEMY-SYSTEMS-OPERATIONAL-US-MILITARY-SHIPBUILDER-1536x960-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/aml3d-commissions-first-two-arcemy-x-systems-at-nns-252636

🚀 ExOne Launches S-Print Pro: Technical Specifications and Pricing ExOne has launched the S-Print Pro, a sand binder jetting (BJT) system designed for smaller foundries and pattern shops that have historically been priced out of industrial additive manufacturing (AM). The machine fits in under 12 m² of floor space and is positioned as the company’s affordable entry point for production-grade sand 3D printing, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/X1_Machine_S-Print_Pro_Operator_in_front_of_machine_IMG-0213-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/exone-launches-s-print-pro-technical-specifications-and-pricing-252623

🏠 Titan America introduces patented 3D printable concrete xForm3D Titan America SA has introduced xForm3D, a US-patented 3D printable concrete technology developed to support automated construction methods across residential, commercial, infrastructure, and coastal applications. The Norfolk, Virginia-based company says … The post Titan America introduces patented 3D printable concrete xForm3D appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Titan-xForm3D-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/titan-america-introduces-patented-3d-printable-concrete-xform3d

🚀 CECIMO Launches AM-Europe to Unify the Continent’s Additive Manufacturing Ecosystem CECIMO, the European Association of Manufacturing Technologies, has officially unveiled AM-Europe, a dedicated continental platform designed to consolidate and amplify the additive manufacturing (AM) sector’s... The initiative marks a deliberate structural shift, transforming CECIMO’s longstanding but internally-focused AM activities into an outward-facing, inclusive ecosystem with a distinct European identity, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/1744278675291-150x100.jpeg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/cecimo-launches-am-europe-to-unify-the-continents-additive-manufacturing-ecosystem-252600

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #171 - 2026-06-27
item.description:
🚀 Beehive Orders 30 New EOS M4 ONYX Printers in $50M Deal US-based propulsion manufacturer Beehive Industries has signed an agreement to buy 30 EOS M4 ONYX metal 3D printers for $50 million. The systems will be installed at the company’s Colorado and Tennessee facilities over the next 12 months, raising Beehive’s total fleet of EOS metal 3D printers to 50, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 26, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Frenzy-Profile-View-2-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/beehive-orders-30-new-eos-m4-onyx-printers-in-50m-deal-252595

🖨 QinetiQ installs dockside additive manufacturing facility at Royal Navy submarine base Defense technology company QinetiQ has established an additive manufacturing facility at HM Naval Base Clyde in Faslane, Scotland, designed to produce submarine components on demand and deliver them dockside to … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 26, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/QinetiQ-Royal-Navy-submarine-base-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/qinetiq-installs-dockside-additive-manufacturing-facility-at-royal-navy-submarine-base

🚀 DSH Technologies launches membership program targeting yield and downtime in powder metallurgy DSH Technologies, a Pineville, North Carolina-based provider of debinding and sintering services, has introduced DSH Advantage, a monthly membership program designed to give metal parts manufacturers direct access to... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 26, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/DSH-Technologies-membership-program-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/dsh-technologies-launches-membership-program-targeting-yield-and-downtime-in-powder-metallurgy

🚀 NCAME Partners with 6K Additive to Close the Data Gap Holding Back Cold Spray Repair Researchers at Auburn University’s National Center for Additive Manufacturing Excellence (NCAME) have launched a study with metal powder producer 6K Additive to evaluate how cold spray feedstock materials perform... “This project is about understanding…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 26, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/NCAME_6KAdditive-7-of-131-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/ncame-partners-with-6k-additive-to-close-the-data-gap-holding-back-cold-spray-repair-252571

💻 Aalto University and Stanford Test a New Architecture for 6G Surfaces Researchers at Stanford University and Aalto University have built and tested a 3D printed panel that simultaneously handles six wireless signals across different frequencies, angles, and polarizations, boosting... The research was conducted by Mohammad M, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 26, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/41467_2026_73019_Fig1_HTML-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/aalto-university-and-stanford-test-a-new-architecture-for-6g-surfaces-252578

🏠 Application spotlight: FDM technology enables 88% cost-per-part reduction for replacement C-17 lavatory parts United States Air Force Maintenance Squadrons deployed a Stratasys F900 machine and Antero 800NA to produce the components. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 26, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/lavatory-floor-plan-with-f900-3d-printer.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/application-spotlight-fdm-technology-enables-88-cost-per-part-reduction-for-replacement-c-17-lavatory-parts

🚀 SLM co-inventor & Nikon SLM Chief Engineer Dieter Schwarze retires Schwarze completes a more than 40-year career which was dedicated to developing and advancing metal additive manufacturing technology. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 25, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/1650313.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/slm-co-inventor-nikon-slm-chief-engineer-dieter-schwarze-retires

📰 3YOURMIND & Phillips Corporation participate in Rim of the Pacific international military exercise The 3YOURMIND and Phillips Corporation efforts will validate a "C2 - command control" system for production orchestration to support the U.S. Department of War’s vision of delivering critical parts at the point of need, reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 25, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/USS_20Essex_20Conducts_20Amphibious_20Assault_20Operations_20During_20RIMPAC_202022_20-_20PO2_20Donita_20Burke-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/3yourmind-phillips-corporation-participate-in-rim-of-the-pacific-international-military-exercise

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #170 - 2026-06-26
item.description:
🔥 3D Printing Market Size Is Set to Hit $135 Billion by 2033 - vocal.media 3D Printing Market Size Is Set to Hit $135 Billion by 2033 vocal.media Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 25, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxPc21EcThNTGE3c1dJeDJvWWJzOVVmN092T2h6Y09kX0F2NDRQbzJVcGFrRjVVMjRRMEI0dDVOMUcwVkVWb21wd2JCVmdJemFaQk9ISkxQYVB4Z1hqMWwzSVFuQlR4UldwRHllX1g4ZFFrd2p3ekdkSHVvc0pYYjl0eHJJS3dGdlJfRW5WdmxoX2g?oc=5

🚨 ELEGOO launches Centauri 2 Series 3D printers - Engineering.com ELEGOO launches Centauri 2 Series 3D printers Engineering.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 25, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE1kR1ByN0c0NkNzNkpaaHNfMHkteTc4UDhqd3hHNnpkNDhmMXJyeWsxQkhxVjlESkN0VTA1R29VOVNkcjJGSFlILThsWXB1XzBydkZLR0M0U0ZrZGlZMXo5MVpvMjlJaDg3LURONWlQOXdCWjVSQ0lBZDhLODJtX0U?oc=5

📰 CU Boulder researchers find seaweed derivative makes earthen materials viable for 3D printing Researchers at the University of Colorado Boulder have identified sodium alginate — a seaweed-derived compound used in food manufacturing — as an additive that makes natural earthen materials like clay … The post CU... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 25, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/CU-Boulder-natural-materials-03-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/cu-boulder-researchers-find-seaweed-derivative-makes-earthen-materials-viable-for-3d-printing

💻 Duondolo, a modern rocking chair made using LFAM 3D printing When one thinks of a rocking chair, one generally thinks of a creaky wooden chair sat on a porch or in the corner of a nursery. Not designer Valentina Bottani, … The post Duondolo, a modern rocking chair made using LFAM 3D printing appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/3d-printed-rocking-chair-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/duondolo-a-modern-rocking-chair-made-using-lfam-3d-printing

🖨 DLA’s Columbus test center cuts fixture lead times with FDM The Defense Logistics Agency (DLA) Weapons Support Product Test Center (PTC) in Columbus, Ohio, has reduced testing fixture production times from several weeks or months to as little as six … The post DLA’s Columbus... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 25, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/DLA-Product-Test-Center-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/dlas-columbus-test-center-cuts-fixture-lead-times-with-fdm

💻 Research project aims to unlock additive manufacturing for Australian maritime and defence supply chain "We can help manufacturers make faster, more informed decisions about where additive manufacturing can deliver measurable benefits." Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 25, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/Austal_CoE_AMCRC-Project1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/research-project-aims-to-unlock-additive-manufacturing-for-australian-maritime-and-defence-supply-chain

💻 3D Print Gallery’s Fourth Exhibition Puts Sustainability and the Ocean at Centre Stage Haarlem’s 3D Print Gallery is preparing to open its fourth exhibition this July, titled “An Ocean of Possibilities for Sustainability.” The show, running from 1 July for three months at De Koepel brings together four... The exhibition is an initiative…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 25, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Screenshot-2026-06-24-at-18.51.20-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/3d-print-gallerys-fourth-exhibition-puts-sustainability-and-the-ocean-at-centre-stage-252520

📰 Lumafield promises 'continuous stream of quality intelligence' with new X-ray CT platforms Lumafield believes Neptune Performance and Triton Performance turn X-ray CT into a 'continuous thread of quality intelligence' from prototype to high-volume production. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 25, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/Lumafield.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/lumafield-promises-continuous-stream-of-quality-intelligence-with-new-x-ray-ct-platforms

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #169 - 2026-06-25
item.description:
🔥 This 11-Year-Old Used Her Savings for a Bambu Lab Printer, Now It's a Viral Family Business - All3DP This 11-Year-Old Used Her Savings for a Bambu Lab Printer, Now It's a Viral Family Business All3DP Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 24, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQc3hMVDVqcmxXbkpwb0FFZ2FWTmo4THFDdld0cnlMUHBmTHFySl9XeEcxcmViVEJkM0xveHBLekJlaHNWby0yeHlYemotcnJodmZmZWFMeVh0VUt6NGZ4X2ZKYi1BeFFoTGNVeVdZRFVTYTZPeUNrbnJ2WUw3SUg3dWgxNXcyelhKRl9JSzFrcFVZTEdENHNiOTZ2UE9zVTV4Q3QzdktsQ2JqM0NnT0ZrNQ?oc=5

🚨 E3D launches Bastion coated gears for Bambu Lab printers UK-based extrusion system specialist E3D has launched Bastion Coated Gears, a hardened steel extruder gear and hobb upgrade for Bambu Lab desktop 3D printers. The new components are compatible with the Bambu Lab X1C, X1E, P1P, and P1S, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 24, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/E3d-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/e3d-launches-bastion-coated-gears-for-bambu-lab-printers-252504

🚨 Elegoo expands the Centauri 2 series with two new models. Multicolor printing starting at $299 USD. Centauri 2 and Centauri 2 Combo address growing demand for accessible 4-color printing Elegoo has announced the launch of two new printers from the Centauri 2 series: the Centauri 2 … The post Elegoo expands the... Multicolor printing starting at $299 USD, reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 24, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Official-Poster-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/elegoo-expands-the-centauri-2-series-with-two-new-models-multicolor-printing-starting-at-299-usd

🚨 Bambu Lab Quietly Launches Fleet Hub for Custom Printer Fleet Integration - All3DP Bambu Lab Quietly Launches Fleet Hub for Custom Printer Fleet Integration All3DP Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 24, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxPMXd6RkhrYmIycUptTUNVa3ZOdktTN1c5MkFFSXdONHNNUmdhMjRmdHJ3SmlfR0NoRUFnNDk4Rk8yWEZZaVpzWktNUVpwSnplNXRtQUFpMV9NZVBwTS1GbE1CYXoxTzhIQU52bmFMc2lSODRMZ085QUR6Q3dJaGM3Tm96X01qYl9MTVBibVREcldrTGl6Njh5QjNZNA?oc=5

📰 Elkem Silicones rebrands as Bluestar Silicones following acquisition Elkem Silicones has rebranded as Bluestar Silicones, reverting to the name the business carried from 2007 to 2017 following the completion of Bluestar’s acquisition of the majority of Elkem’s silicones … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 24, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/IMG_4615-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/elkem-silicones-rebrands-as-bluestar-silicones-following-acquisition

🚀 Titan America launches xForm3D concrete 3D printing products "Innovations like xForm3D will help expand what’s possible for the built environment.” Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 24, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/concrete-print-4-1024x768.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/titan-america-launches-xform3d-concrete-3d-printing-products

🖨 Massivit targets defence with RapidWings composite manufacturing platform "RapidWings marks a strategic milestone for Massivit as we pivot from providing industrial 3D printers to delivering a much-needed defence manufacturing platform." Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 24, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/RapidWings-by-Massivit-2400x1350.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/massivit-targets-defence-with-rapidwings-composite-manufacturing-platform

🖨 Phase3D raises $2.9M to expand in-situ inspection for metal additive manufacturing Phase3D has closed a $2.9 million oversubscribed funding round led by Quest Venture Partners. Alongside the close, Ray Farrell joined the Phase3D board of directors, bringing more than 25 years … The post Phase3D raises $2.9M to expand in-situ inspection for metal additive manufacturing appeared first on, reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 24, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Phase3D-group-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/phase3d-raises-2-9m-to-expand-in-situ-inspection-for-metal-additive-manufacturing

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #168 - 2026-06-24
item.description:
💻 Zellerfeld cites manufacturing-grade data quality in Volumental investment Custom-fit footwear has been technically achievable for years, yet it has remained a niche offering. According to Zellerfeld, the obstacle has not been print technology — it has been data … The post Zellerfeld cites manufacturing-grade data quality in Volumental investment appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Volumental-scanner-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/zellerfeld-cites-manufacturing-grade-data-quality-in-volumental-investment

💻 River Luminaire, lighting made using Haddy’s LFAM Montreal-based lighting company Eureka, a part of the Acuity Brands Lighting portfolio, has released a new series of light fixtures. Called River Luminaire, the series continues the company’s tradition of … The post River Luminaire, lighting made using Haddy’s LFAM appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/river-luminaire-2-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/river-luminaire-lighting-made-using-haddys-lfam

🖨 Solukon releases SPR-Pathfinder PRO for high-complexity LPBF depowdering Solukon has released SPR-Pathfinder PRO, a substantially upgraded version of its depowdering simulation software for laser powder bed fusion parts. The release targets manufacturers producing high-complexity metal components — including … The post Solukon releases SPR-Pathfinder PRO for high-complexity LPBF depowdering appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Solukon-SPR-Pathfinder-PRO-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/solukon-releases-spr-pathfinder-pro-for-high-complexity-lpbf-depowdering

🏠 Additive Manufacturing Cuts Months to Weeks for Royal Navy in Australia When Royal Australian Navy submarine HMS Anson required replacement components during a routine Submarine Maintenance Period (SMP) at HMAS Stirling, the conventional supply chain wasn’t an option. British defence technology QinetiQ stepped in, using additive manufacturing to design, produce, and deliver the parts in four weeks, a process that would typically take months or years, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Screenshot-2026-06-22-at-23.15.55-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/additive-manufacturing-cuts-months-to-weeks-for-royal-navy-in-australia-252461

🖨 Stratasys Targets Rail Certification Gap with New Flame-Retardant FDM Material Additive manufacturing has long promised to transform how rail operators manage spare parts, yet certification hurdles have kept most materials on the sideline. Stratasys is addressing that gap directly with the release of FDM PA6/66-GF30-FR, a flame-retardant, glass-fiber-reinforced nylon developed specifically for end-use production in rail and transit environments, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/STRP059_Stratasys_PA6_66_rail_handle_train-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/stratasys-targets-rail-certification-gap-with-new-flame-retardant-fdm-material-252458

🚀 Markforged Launches Onyx GF for Factory Floor Visual Management FDM 3D printer manufacturer Markforged has announced Onyx GF, a chopped glass fiber-filled nylon that adds functional color to its established Onyx material family. Available in six colors — red, yellow, blue, green, gray, and white — the material is aimed at manufacturers who use color-coded tooling and fixtures for error-proofing, hazard signaling, and…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Onyx-GF-Hero-Image-3840x2160-1-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/markforged-launches-onyx-gf-for-factory-floor-visual-management-252473

📰 Anantara Dhigu and rrreefs Install 3D Printed Reef Structures in the Maldives Anantara Dhigu Maldives Resort, nestled in South Malé Atoll, has installed 13 flower-shaped reef structures on its lagoon floor in partnership with Swiss reef restoration company rrreefs, an effort to counter coral... The Theyra Maa installation, built from 3D printed fired terracotta clay and…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/1781496413612-150x100.jpeg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/anantara-dhigu-and-rrreefs-install-3d-printed-reef-structures-in-the-maldives-252453

📰 AMPOWER and TAAG Partner to Link AM Market Intelligence with Industrial Production Expertise AMPOWER and TAAG have partnered to address the disconnect between market intelligence and industrial production in the additive manufacturing (AM) sector. AMPOWER, founded in Hamburg in 2017 by Dr, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Additive-Manufacturing-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/ampower-and-taag-partner-to-link-am-market-intelligence-with-industrial-production-expertise-252478

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #167 - 2026-06-23
item.description:
♻️ 3DPOD 303: 6K Additive CEO Frank Roberts on Premium and Sustainable Metal AM Powder 6K Additive is roaring ahead with a recycling solution for metals. Their path from scrap to powder is helping the US to be more resilient, produce powder locally and perhaps, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 22, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326058/3dpod-303-6k-additive-ceo-frank-roberts-on-premium-and-sustainable-metal-am-powder

📰 Phase3D closes oversubscribed $2.9 million funding round The company says the investment marks a 'deliberate and exciting' new chapter for Phase3D, with a plan in place to move from a 'high-mix custom build model to standardised product manufacturing at scale.' Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 22, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/PHASE3D_DAY02_122-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/phase3d-closes-oversubscribed-2-9-million-funding-round

Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 22, 2026. Portuguese 3D … The post 500m² 3D printed recycling center erected in Portugal appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. It’s the largest FIFA tournament in history, with 48 teams competing over 104 matches, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 21, 2026. 🚀 Newcastle University and Vindolanda use 3D scanning to reproduce Roman board game Researchers at Newcastle University’s School of Engineering worked with the Vindolanda Charitable Trust to produce a 3D printed replica of a Roman game board excavated at the Vindolanda Roman fort … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Newcastle-Uni-Roman-Board-Games-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/newcastle-university-and-vindolanda-use-3d-scanning-to-reproduce-roman-board-game

🚀 Australia Is Turning to 3D Printing to Secure Its Industrial Foundation A new policy report from the Australian Strategic Policy Institute (ASPI), authored by Steven Camilleri, co-founder and CTO of metal 3D printing company SPEE3D, argues that national resilience is not a political... Titled Make Stuff Here… Or Else, the report introduces the concept of the “Sovereignty Countdown”: the measured window…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Screenshot-2026-06-19-at-16.49.43-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/australia-is-turning-to-3d-printing-to-secure-its-industrial-foundation-252432

🏠 Havelar Prints a Public Building in Nine Days and Delivers It on Budget Portuguese firm Havelar erected a 500 m² recycling center office at the Ecocentro de Perafita in Porto for the Matosinhos municipality using a COBOD BOD2 3D printer, a four-person crew, and nine working days. More unusually still, the project came in on budget, a feat the partners themselves described as rare for public works in…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Havelar-x-COBOD_1-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/havelar-prints-a-public-building-in-nine-days-and-delivers-it-on-budget-252428

The show runs September 14–19 at McCormick Place in Chicago, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 20, 2026. item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #164 - 2026-06-20
item.description:

This week, the company launched a new filament,, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 19, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/327181/bambu-lab-wants-home-3d-printing-to-feel-less-like-a-workshop

🖨 Nikon SLM Solutions and NB Additive form North American partnership Nikon SLM Solutions and NB Additive have formed a strategic partnership to expand access to industrial metal additive manufacturing systems and build out integrated production workflows across North America. The … The post Nikon SLM Solutions and NB Additive form North American partnership appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Nikon-SLM-Solutions-and-NB-Additive-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/nikon-slm-solutions-and-nb-additive-form-north-american-partnership

🏠 AML3D delivers two ARCEMY X printers to Newport News Shipbuilding In October 2025, Australian AM company AML3D received an order from Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS) worth upwards of $3 million (AU$4.5M) for two custom ARCEMY X metal 3D printers. Now, … The post AML3D delivers two ARCEMY X printers to Newport News Shipbuilding appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/arcemy-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/aml3d-delivers-two-arcemy-x-printers-to-newport-news-shipbuilding

🚀 SHINING 3D Dental launches Ceramix-Nano chairside 3D printer SHINING 3D Dental has released the Ceramix-Nano, a chairside dental 3D printer capable of producing permanent ceramic crowns, veneers, inlays, onlays, and Maryland bridges within a single patient appointment. The … The post SHINING 3D Dental launches Ceramix-Nano chairside 3D printer appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/SHINING-3D-Ceramix-Nano-Capsule-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/shining-3d-dental-launches-ceramix-nano-chairside-3d-printer

💻 Why small-batch alloy development is becoming strategically important again In many important materials programs, the first useful quantity is much smaller. A research team may need enough powder to compare three or four variations of a new composition, reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 19, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/image-88-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/why-small-batch-alloy-development-is-becoming-strategically-important-again

The alloy company is trying to create a platform that will enable the solid state manufacturing of alloys, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 19, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/327105/foundation-alloy-raises-22m-for-solid-state-molybdenum

🖨 AM Asia Watch: China’s 3D Printing Boom Is Creating a New Class of Micro-Manufacturers China’s additive manufacturing (AM) industry has spent years trying to reduce its reliance on foreign technology. In polymer 3D printing, domestic companies have already become major players, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 19, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326656/am-asia-watch-chinas-3d-printing-boom-is-creating-a-new-class-of-micro-manufacturers

As the company recently revealed, … The post Rheinmetall UK using miniFactory 3D printer for tank ducting appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/_AB55491.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/tct-and-smf-introduce-next-3d-printing-rising-star

🚀 Stratasys launches flame-retardant FDM material for rail and transportation applications Stratasys has introduced FDM PA6/66-GF30-FR, a flame-retardant composite thermoplastic developed for rail and transportation manufacturers producing certified end-use and spare parts. The material is compatible with Stratasys’ Fortus 450mc and … The post Stratasys launches flame-retardant FDM material for rail and transportation applications appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Stratasys-FDM-PA666-GF30-FR-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/stratasys-launches-flame-retardant-fdm-material-for-rail-and-transportation-applications

📰 ORNL’s mold-free 3D printing method cuts composite fabrication time by 95% Researchers at the US Department of Energy’s Manufacturing Demonstration Facility (MDF) at Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) have developed a hybrid additive manufacturing method that removes the need for molds …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/ORNL-mold-free-3D-printing-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ornls-mold-free-3d-printing-method-cuts-composite-fabrication-time-by-95

🏠 Havelar constructs public building with COBOD 3D printing technology on budget The project, a 500 m² (5,400 ft²) recycling centre office at the Ecocentro de Perafita in Porto, was printed in nine days. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/image--30--1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/havelar-constructs-public-building-with-cobod-3d-printing-technology-on-budget

🚀 Stratasys launches DM PA6/66-GF30-FR material for rail & transportation Engineered specifically for use on Stratasys' Fortus 450mc and F900 systems, Stratasys says the material has been designed to produce certified end-use parts and critical spare parts. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/Stratasys_PA6_66_rail_handle_train-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/stratasys-launches-dm-pa6-66-gf30-fr-material-for-rail-transportation
